claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Build with the most accurate and cost-effective real-time APIs for speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and voice agents.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The link to 'Pricing' is available directly on the homepage.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: "For detailed model, language, and feature availability, please refer to our Developer Documentation."

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Deepgram is committed to a robust ecosystem of partnerships and integrations. With our native integrations, code samples and reference architectures for a variety of use cases, customers of all shapes and sizes can create business value from voice data with Deepgram.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
